runtimeLoadOrder: active inline scripts in index.html, excluding all data-runtime-disabled template ranges
scopeNotes: Definitions inside data-runtime-disabled template elements are archive text and do not execute.
script.js, all_scripts.js and script_*.js are tracked legacy/aggregate artifacts but are not referenced by the current index.html load list.
loadOrder is relative within the runtime chain; wrapper definitions retain and call the prior function unless noted.

definitions.notes: Base legacy calculation using activityLoadForDate, Gym, RPE, pain and recent load.

Replaces the global function and uses Polar-first SimurgWorkoutSource metrics. Behavior differs from the base calculation. SimurgReadiness.resolve may be preferred by many renderers, creating an additional parallel decision path.

functions.risk: P1: callers may receive different scores depending on whether they use calculateReadiness or SimurgReadiness.resolve.

definitions.notes: Single active global definition, but it consumes calculateReadiness/activityLoadForDate that are replaced later by workout-source-policy.js.

functions.risk: P1: stable function body has runtime-dependent inputs because its dependencies are overridden later.

definitions.notes: Base English-heavy renderer.
Premium visual override.
Later activity-aware coaching override; likely active current renderer.

functions.risk: P2/P1: three implementations make fixes and security escaping inconsistent; later reassignment silently replaces earlier behavior.

definitions.notes: Base weekly coach summary.
Premium visual override.
Activity-aware override; likely active current renderer.

functions.risk: P2: duplicated report logic and inconsistent assumptions about source data and output escaping.

definitions.notes: Small fixed alias list with raw fallback.
Expanded alias resolver and title-cased fallback.

functions.risk: P2: normalization output differs by definition; historical callers may have captured older behavior.

definitions.notes: Mutates input object and maps a narrow field set.
Clones input and accepts a wider set of Apple Health/Watch aliases.

functions.risk: P1/P2: mutation and accepted fields differ; deduplication and downstream calculations can vary.

definitions.notes: Legacy Apple Watch/Gym aggregation.
Reassigned to SimurgWorkoutSource.metrics, adding Polar-first source policy and different load semantics.

functions.risk: P1: a core global changes return semantics after inline renderers are defined.

definitions.notes: Global parser interprets a two-part value as minutes:seconds.
Module-local parser interprets a two-part value as hours:minutes and is exported as SimurgWorkoutSource.durationMinutes, not as the global.
Module-local legacy Polar Bridge parser for sleep duration; does not replace the global.

functions.risk: P1: the same string can produce materially different durations depending on call path.

definitions.notes: Base daily report.
Activity-aware daily card renderer; later definition replaces the base.

functions.risk: P1/P2: duplicate renderer plus unsafe raw exercise/date interpolation in the likely-active path.

definitions.notes: Base weekly renderer.
Activity-aware weekly renderer; becomes the base of the wrapper chain.
Wrapper adds a coach recommendation asynchronously.
Wrapper adds premium weekly recommendation.
Wrapper adds Program Intelligence output.
Wrapper removes monthly content from weekly output.
Outermost active wrapper; invokes the entire earlier chain then applies Program Intelligence cleanup.

functions.risk: P1/P2: a six-layer wrapper chain with timers makes final DOM state order-dependent and difficult to secure or test.

definitions.notes: Base full-object localStorage save and render. simurgPersistData dynamically calls the final global save.
Replaces save, marks local-update metadata, writes the complete DATA object, invalidates signal caches, renders and refreshes local status.

functions.risk: P1: full-object persistence has no schema/revision validation; many unrelated mutation paths depend on one global side effect.

definitions.notes: Base dispatcher for workout, Apple Watch, daily and weekly JSON.
Expanded alias/segment handling replaces the base.
Undo snapshot wrapper around the prior function.
Imported-date UI wrapper around the prior chain.
Legacy Polar Recovery dispatcher before falling through to prior wrappers.
Outermost active wrapper recognizes Polar Flow workout JSON, otherwise invokes the full prior chain.

functions.risk: P0/P1: imported data passes through multiple independently maintained dispatchers without a single schema gate; wrapper order controls behavior.

nonRuntimeDuplicates.notes: These tracked files contain additional copies/wrappers, but current index.html does not load them. They remain a maintenance and accidental-reintroduction risk, not current runtime overrides.

trackedDefinitionInventory.notes: Exhaustive text-level inventory for the prioritized names in tracked HTML/JS. Entries in unreferenced script artifacts and index.html data-runtime-disabled template ranges are not executed. Assignments such as activityLoadForDate=metrics are represented in the detailed runtime section even when they are not syntactically named function expressions.
